tldr: Pogačar's fourth stage win of the week — solo on the Leysin climb to seal both stage and overall. Lipowitz and Roglič the closest chase from Red Bull-Bora, neither close enough to threaten.

narrative.headline: Pogačar solo on Leysin, GC sealed
narrative.body: 178.2 km from Lucens to the Leysin summit. Pogačar attacked late on the climb, took the line solo. Stage win + overall win. The fourth stage win of his week — a near-clean sweep of the climbing stages.

gcImpact.headline: Pogačar wins Romandie 2026
gcImpact.body: Final GC: Pogačar overall. The week's third overall WorldTour win after Catalunya and on-form for Liège in twenty-three days.

riderPerformances.name: Tadej Pogačar
riderPerformances.narrative: Fourth stage win + GC. Romandie 2026 added to the list of races nobody else could win when Pogačar wanted them.
